SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, DEC-06-2012: JASON SIDLICK, ESQ. APPEARS THIS DAY ON BEHALF OFDEFENDANT CATHRYN HANNIFF, WHO IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT IS INFORMED THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED; COUNSEL SIDLICK INFORMS THE COURT IT IS HIS INTENTION FOR FILE A DISMISSAL IN THIS APPEAL. THE COURT ORDERS THE APPEAL DISMISSED, CASE SETTLED, AND SIGNS ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL.
